build.command: python3 scripts/run_memory_guarded.py --max-tree-rss-mib 12000 --min-available-mib 4096 --poll-seconds 0.5 --json /tmp/cuboctahedron_ap16az_semantic_precomputed_signature_guard.json -- bash -lc 'export LEAN_NUM_THREADS=1; export LAKE_JOBS=1; timeout 220s lake build Cuboctahedron.Generated.Translation.TwoSource.SupportFamilies.PositiveSurvivorPrecomputedSignatureSmoke'

decision: Keep the AP16T Boolean-premised theorem for regression, but use the AP16AZ semantic-premised theorem as the production target. The remaining membership premise should be closed with compact denominator/signature witnesses instead of raw goodDirectionAtRankBool reduction.
